parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor for pagination. If not provided, starts from the beginning.

parameters.name: pageSize

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status to update. Must be one of 'read', 'unread', 'starred', or 'unstarred'.

parameters.description: The search query string.
